sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_edges (id UInt32, resolution UInt8, length Float64, angle Float64);
INSERT INTO geo_edges VALUES (1, 10, 5.2, h3EdgeAngle(10)), (2, 0, NULL, h3EdgeAngle(0));
SELECT id, length FROM geo_edges WHERE angle NOT IN (SELECT h3EdgeAngle(resolution) FROM geo_edges WHERE resolution > 5) AND length > 4.0;
SELECT id, h3EdgeAngle(resolution) AS edgeAngle FROM geo_edges GROUP BY id HAVING edgeAngle NOT IN (SELECT angle FROM geo_edges WHERE length IS NULL);
SELECT AVG(h3EdgeAngle(resolution)) AS avgEdgeAngle FROM geo_edges WHERE resolution NOT IN (UNION ALL SELECT resolution FROM geo_edges WHERE length < 1.0);
WITH (SELECT h3EdgeAngle(resolution) FROM geo_edges WHERE resolution <= 5) AS angles SELECT id FROM geo_edges WHERE angles NOT IN (angle) AND id IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE geo_edges_temp AS geo_edges ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO geo_edges_temp SELECT id, resolution + 1, length * 2, h3EdgeAngle(resolution + 1) FROM geo_edges WHERE angle IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM geo_edges_temp GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) NOT IN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM geo_edges WHERE resolution IS NULL AND angle IS NOT NULL);
